securityDescription: Steals data, runs unexpected code, or ships a known vulnerability.
spamDescription: Misleading name, impersonates another package, or low-quality spam.
impersonationDescription: Uses a brand or author identity it has no right to.
brokenDescription: Does something materially different from what it claims.
dmcaDescription: Includes code or assets that infringe copyright.
otherDescription: Anything the categories above do not cover.
